preconditions: Euro-Office v9.3.1 oracle is running on port 8088
static harness is running on port 4179
both frames use the exact original SpreadsheetEditor runtime
fixture and native XLSY payload hashes match evidence

captured_steps.expected: Oracle renders the clustered column chart titled CTOX Revenue 2026
Both editor iframes are 599.5 by 670 CSS pixels
Original UI reports CTOX Revenue Chart and enables Diagrammeinstellungen
Gate passes with the same CTOX Spreadsheets runtime, chart title, four categories, four values and green series fill

implementation_flow: Identify spreadsheet chart records and anchors in sdkjs writer/reader sources
Emit worksheet drawing records plus Chart2 payload into XLSY without replacing the CTOX Spreadsheets UI
Use the original visible Chart Settings UI to change title, style, size and chart type identically on both sides
Capture CTOX XLSY, export natively to XLSX and preserve unrelated package parts byte-for-byte
Reopen the CTOX export in CTOX and in the Euro-Office oracle
Run the identical original-UI flow through modules/spreadsheets.mount(ctx) and office.spreadsheet.commit
